sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, content String);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, content) VALUES (1, 'Hello World!'), (2, 'Test String 123'), (3, 'Regular Expression: ^.*$');
SELECT id, content FROM test_strings WHERE match(content, 'World') = 1;
UPDATE test_strings SET content = 'Updated String!' WHERE match(content, 'Test String') = 1;
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE match(content, '(?s)^.*(Regular|Expression).*') = 1;
